plugins.name: create-wiki
plugins.description: Create a DeepWiki-style documentation of your codebase. Generates architecture diagrams, module breakdowns, and a full navigable wiki.

plugins.name: incremental-implementation
plugins.description: Analyze a plan, break it into dependency-ordered chunks, and implement step by step — avoiding the vibe-coding trap.

plugins.name: review-diff
plugins.description: Generate a markdown document with before/after diagrams and a detailed walkthrough of the current git diff or any PR.

plugins.name: walkthrough
plugins.description: Walk through each change in a codebase one by one inside a Claude Code session, explaining behavior before and after each change.
